pi_items.source: setup_task.sh explicitly generates the RASP custom motor file at this exact location.
setup_task.sh copies the simple_model_rocket.ork source file to this exact location and strips existing simulations.
export_result.sh checks for this specific target ORK file.
export_result.sh and verifier.py parse this target text file to extract apogee and velocity metrics.
setup_task.sh generates the custom .eng motor file with 'SRAD_Team' defined as the manufacturer. This is explicitly verified in verifier.py.
setup_task.sh generates the custom .eng motor file with 'SRAD_C40' defined as the motor code. This is explicitly verified in verifier.py.
verifier.py uses a minimum score of 70 to determine pass/fail.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically generated custom RASP solid rocket motor file (`SRAD_C40.eng`) initialized via `setup_task.sh`. The motor code is explicitly 'SRAD_C40' and the manufacturer is 'SRAD_Team', which are strictly verified by `verifier.py` after parsing the agent-saved target `.ork` file (`/home/ga/Documents/rockets/srad_simulated_rocket.ork`). Furthermore, the task requires generating a post-flight characterization report at `/home/ga/Documents/exports/srad_flight_report.txt` containing numeric simulated metrics.
